examples: This paper reviewed the research progress in synthesis of citral in the recent years.
Phase transfer catalyst was used for synthesis of citral diethyl acetal, the yield has increased.
The refining process of citral product from natural litsea cubeba was studied by means of vacuum batch distillation.
Once citral gets into this circular form, it loses its lemony scent and starts to stink.
The most commonly used lemon-flavor molecule, citral, fades within 30 days when put in an acid medium like lemonade.
